title: felicia diffusa subsp. diffusa
intro: Felicia diffusa subsp. diffusa, also known as Yellow or Common Felicia, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it a valuable resource for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Felicia diffusa subsp. diffusa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues, among others. Felicia diffusa subsp. diffusa can be prepared as herbal tea, capsules, or infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
